subcodes.first_line: O thou who clingest to the cord of deeds and utterance! How excellent are thy deeds in the path of God and His love, and thy sincerity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المتمسک بحبل العمل و البیان حبذا عملک فی سبیل الله و حبه و خلوصک
subcodes.subjects: @John the Baptist, @cleanliness and refinement, @monasticism; asceticism, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
